evidenceItems.name: Data Classification Policy Document
evidenceItems.description: Approved data classification policy defining levels, handling requirements, and responsibilities.

evidenceItems.name: Classification Training Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of data classification training completion by data owners and handlers.

evidenceItems.name: Data Inventory Register
evidenceItems.description: Comprehensive inventory of data assets with classification levels, owners, and locations.

evidenceItems.name: Data Flow Diagrams
evidenceItems.description: Diagrams showing data flows across systems, networks, and third parties.

evidenceItems.name: Labeling Audit Report
evidenceItems.description: Results of labeling accuracy audits across sampled data assets.

evidenceItems.name: Data Handling Procedures Document
evidenceItems.description: Documented handling procedures for each classification level.

evidenceItems.name: Metadata Standards Documentation
evidenceItems.description: Documented metadata taxonomy and tagging standards.

evidenceItems.name: Encryption Compliance Dashboard
evidenceItems.description: Dashboard showing FDE compliance across all endpoints.

evidenceItems.name: TDE Status Report
evidenceItems.description: Report showing TDE enabled/disabled status for all database instances.

evidenceItems.name: Cloud Encryption Configuration Evidence
evidenceItems.description: Screenshots/exports showing SSE and CMK configuration for cloud storage.

evidenceItems.name: File Encryption Policy
evidenceItems.description: Policy document defining file encryption requirements per classification level.

evidenceItems.name: Key Escrow Procedure and Test Records
evidenceItems.description: Documented key escrow procedures and records of recovery testing.

evidenceItems.name: TLS Configuration Scan Results
evidenceItems.description: SSL Labs or testssl.sh scan results showing TLS configuration for all external endpoints.

evidenceItems.name: Certificate Inventory
evidenceItems.description: Complete inventory of X.509 certificates with expiry dates and responsible owners.

evidenceItems.name: VPN Configuration Standards
evidenceItems.description: Documented VPN configuration standards and audit of compliance.

evidenceItems.name: API Encryption Audit
evidenceItems.description: Audit results showing encryption status of all APIs.

evidenceItems.name: Email Encryption Configuration
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of email encryption configuration (STARTTLS, MTA-STS, S/MIME).

evidenceItems.name: Confidential Computing Assessment
evidenceItems.description: Assessment of data-in-use protection requirements and confidential computing feasibility.

evidenceItems.name: Tokenization Platform Configuration
evidenceItems.description: Configuration and deployment evidence for tokenization platform.

evidenceItems.name: DLP Policy Configuration
evidenceItems.description: Documented DLP policies with detection rules per data classification level.

evidenceItems.name: DLP Incident Reports
evidenceItems.description: Monthly DLP incident reports including violations, false positives, and trends.

evidenceItems.name: DLP Coverage Report
evidenceItems.description: Report showing DLP deployment coverage across channels (network, endpoint, cloud, email).

evidenceItems.name: DLP False Positive Analysis
evidenceItems.description: Analysis of DLP false positive rates and tuning actions taken.

evidenceItems.name: Endpoint DLP Agent Deployment Status
evidenceItems.description: Report showing endpoint DLP agent installation status across all managed endpoints.

evidenceItems.name: Cryptographic Standards Document
evidenceItems.description: Approved cryptographic algorithms, key lengths, and usage standards.

evidenceItems.name: HSM Audit Logs
evidenceItems.description: HSM access and operation audit logs.

evidenceItems.name: Key Rotation Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of key rotation events with dates, key identifiers, and responsible parties.

evidenceItems.name: Key Destruction Certificates
evidenceItems.description: Certificates documenting key destruction events with verification.

evidenceItems.name: BYOK/HYOK Implementation Evidence
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of BYOK/HYOK configuration for cloud services.

evidenceItems.name: Key Management Procedures
evidenceItems.description: Documented key management procedures for generation, distribution, storage, rotation, and destruction.

evidenceItems.name: Backup Encryption Status Report
evidenceItems.description: Report showing encryption status of all backup jobs.

evidenceItems.name: Immutable Backup Configuration
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of WORM/immutability configuration on backup storage.

evidenceItems.name: Air-Gap Backup Schedule and Chain of Custody
evidenceItems.description: Records of air-gapped backup creation and media chain of custody.

evidenceItems.name: Recovery Test Results
evidenceItems.description: Results of backup recovery tests including RTO/RPO measurements.

evidenceItems.name: Ransomware Recovery Exercise Report
evidenceItems.description: Results and lessons from ransomware recovery tabletop exercises.

evidenceItems.name: Backup Policy Document
evidenceItems.description: Backup policy covering frequency, retention, encryption, and testing requirements.

evidenceItems.name: DAM Deployment Status
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of DAM deployment across databases containing sensitive data.

evidenceItems.name: Database Access Review Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of quarterly database access reviews and recertification.

evidenceItems.name: Database Masking Configuration
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of dynamic and static masking configuration on databases.

evidenceItems.name: Virtual Patching Status
evidenceItems.description: Report on virtual patch coverage and patch gap metrics.

evidenceItems.name: Column Encryption Inventory
evidenceItems.description: Inventory of columns with column-level encryption enabled.

evidenceItems.name: Database Security Baseline
evidenceItems.description: Database security hardening baseline configuration documentation.

evidenceItems.name: Static Masking Configuration and Verification
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of SDM rules and verification that non-production data is masked.

evidenceItems.name: Dynamic Masking Rules Documentation
evidenceItems.description: Documented DDM rules by data element and user role.

evidenceItems.name: Tokenization Platform Evidence
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of tokenization platform deployment and scope coverage.

evidenceItems.name: Non-Production Data Scan Results
evidenceItems.description: Scan results verifying no production sensitive data exists in non-production environments.

evidenceItems.name: De-identification Risk Assessment
evidenceItems.description: Re-identification risk assessment for anonymized/de-identified datasets.

evidenceItems.name: Media Sanitization Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of all media sanitization events with methods, dates, and responsible parties.

evidenceItems.name: Crypto-Shredding Verification Records
evidenceItems.description: Records of crypto-shredding events with key destruction verification.

evidenceItems.name: Certificates of Destruction
evidenceItems.description: Formal certificates of destruction for all disposed media.

evidenceItems.name: Cloud Data Deletion Evidence
evidenceItems.description: Evidence of cloud data deletion verification across replicas and backups.

evidenceItems.name: Data Retention Schedule
evidenceItems.description: Documented data retention schedule aligned with regulatory requirements.

evidenceItems.name: Legal Hold Register
evidenceItems.description: Register of active legal holds preventing data disposal.

evidenceItems.name: Data Protection Policy
evidenceItems.description: Overarching data protection policy covering all 10 control domains.

evidenceItems.name: Encryption Standards Document
evidenceItems.description: Organization-wide encryption standards covering algorithms, key lengths, and implementation requirements.

evidenceItems.name: Annual Data Protection Risk Assessment
evidenceItems.description: Annual risk assessment covering data protection threats, vulnerabilities, and control effectiveness.

evidenceItems.name: Data Protection KPI Dashboard
evidenceItems.description: Dashboard showing key data protection metrics across all control domains.

evidenceItems.name: Third-Party Data Protection Assessment
evidenceItems.description: Assessment of third-party data protection controls for vendors handling organizational data.

evidenceItems.name: Data Protection Incident Log
evidenceItems.description: Log of all data protection incidents including DLP violations, unauthorized access, and data breaches.

evidenceItems.name: Security Awareness Training — Data Protection Module
evidenceItems.description: Records of data protection-specific security awareness training completion.

evidenceItems.name: Regulatory Compliance Matrix
evidenceItems.description: Matrix mapping data protection controls to regulatory requirements (PCI DSS, BNM RMiT, ISO 27001).

evidenceItems.name: Penetration Test Report — Data Protection Scope
evidenceItems.description: Penetration test results focused on data protection controls (encryption, DLP bypass, database access).

evidenceItems.name: Data Protection Architecture Diagram
evidenceItems.description: Architecture diagram showing data protection control deployment across the technology environment.
